category_sources: source_facts.description says Parallel netCDF library for scientific data using OpenMPI; official PnetCDF site describes a parallel I/O library for NetCDF file access.
display_name_sources: Official PnetCDF homepage states the official name is PnetCDF.
docs_sources: Official PnetCDF site provides a User Guide documentation page and project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official PnetCDF download page gives the clone command git clone https://github.com/Parallel-NetCDF/PnetCDF.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official PnetCDF homepage identify parallel NetCDF access, scientific data, MPI/HPC use, and library utilities.
